title: InmisAddon x BareBones
body:
This resource pack retextures textures from the InmisAddon mod to match the Bare Bones resource pack.

InmisAddon: [https://modrinth.com/mod/inmisaddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmisaddon)

Inmis: [https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis)

BareBones: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)
